channel.title: Very Important People
channel.description: Latest releases from Very Important People on Dropout.tv

item.title: Last Looks: Mother Hot Dog
item.description:
The crew of Very Important People discuss how Rekha Shankar became Mother Hot Dog.

Duration: 05:20

Tags: Very Important People, vic michaelis, disguises, makeup, makeovers, interviews, improv, surprises, rekha shankar, tamar levine, paul robalino, alex perrone, bruce spaulding fuller, alisha silverstein, behind the scenes

item.title: Mother Hot Dog
item.description:
Vic interviews the mother of all hot dogs (Rekha Shankar) and learns how hot dogs are made.

Duration: 21:28

Tags: Very Important People, vic michaelis, disguises, makeup, makeovers, interviews, improv, surprises, rekha shankar

item.title: Very Important People Season 3 Trailer
item.description:
It’s time for the real work to begin. New season premieres December 4th.

Duration: 01:36

Tags: Very Important People, vic michaelis, disguises, makeup, makeovers, interviews, improv, surprises
